script.code:
const siData = {{workflowparams:data.page_status}} == 'Add' ? {{node:add_node_adYeQB4a.data}}[0] : {{node:code_node_JoF0YVzG.data.entry}};

const docFormat = {{node:get_node_auG34VOC.data.data}};
const customerData = {{node:get_node_Jcmd2YdP.data.data}};
const accountMasterData = {{node:get_node_PsZEEuNO.data.data}};

const cpData = {
  cp_no: 'issued',
  area_id: siData.si_area_id,
  irbm_id: customerData.customer_irbm_id,
  agent_id: siData.sales_person_id,
  plant_id: siData.plant_id,
  table_cp: [
    {
      invoice_total: siData.invoice_total,
      paid_amount: siData.invoice_total,
      invoice_id: siData.id,
      line_status: 'Completed',
      outstanding_amount: 0
    }
  ],
  cp_status: 'Completed',
  cp_no_type: docFormat.id,
  customer_id: siData.customer_id,
  payment_date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
  page_status: "Add",
  exchange_rate: siData.exchange_rate,
  organization_id: siData.organization_id,
  unallocated_myr: 'MYR',
  payment_currency: customerData.customer_currency_id,
  customer_currency: customerData.customer_currency_id,
  exchange_rate_myr: "MYR",
  total_payment_myr: "MYR",
  unallocated_amount: 0,
  cust_payment_method: accountMasterData.id,
  payment_description: 'Customer Payment',
  acc_integration_type: siData.acc_integration_type,
  total_payment_amount: siData.invoice_total,
  unallocated_currency: siData.currency_code,
  exchange_rate_currency: siData.currency_code,
  myr_unallocated_amount: 0,
  total_payment_currency: siData.currency_code,
  myr_total_payment_amount: siData.myr_total_amount
}

return { cpData }
